body.title: Non-blocking concurrent turn processing — remove debounce
body.result: Removed debounce from stdin path. Each line now dispatched immediately to per-thread worker via _enqueue_stdin()/_stdin_worker(). Main loop never blocks on LLM inference. _STDIN_EOF sentinel fixes pre-existing EOF detection bug where Ctrl-D was silently ignored. Commands still run inline. Network messages were already non-blocking since #200 was partially in place.
body.description: Remove debounce, enable interleaved responses, non-blocking concurrent turn processing. #200
